failures.description: The agent queried all Jigsaw Puzzles instead of restricting the catalog search to available items. Although the returned cheapest item happened to be available, the first incorrect action was failing to encode the user's availability constraint in the tool call.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user wanted the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the product type and price ordering, but at the planning/tool-call stage it failed to apply the availability constraint in the query, using available_only=false despite the task explicitly requiring available items. This is not a malformed tool call, tool-output misread, or unsupported request; it is a deviation from the required action/query plan.
